meaning: adj.迂回的,转弯抹角的n.道路交叉处的环形路,迂回路线,兜圈子的话
examples: He left today on a roundabout route for Jordan and is also due soon in Egypt.
Freedom of speech is being realized in a roundabout way.
It was a difficult and roundabout trip.
Bear in mind, reaction to changes at Blackfriars Bridge and the controversial Bow roundabout has not been favourable.
She was among doctors in Accident and Emergency who assisted the injured from Pearl Roundabout.
